name: XcodeListWindows
description: Lists the current Xcode windows and their workspace information

name: XcodeRead
description: Reads the contents of a file within the Xcode project organization. Returns content in cat -n format with line numbers. Supports reading up to 600 lines by default with optional offset and limit parameters for large files.

filePath.description: The path to the file within the Xcode project organization (e.g., 'ProjectName/Sources/MyFile.swift')

offset.description: The line number to start reading from (only provide if the file is too large to read at once)

limit.description: The number of lines to read (only provide if the file is too large to read at once)

name: XcodeWrite
description: Creates or overwrites files with content in the Xcode project. Works on Xcode project structure paths, not filesystem paths. Automatically adds new files to the project structure. Both filePath and content parameters are required.

filePath.description: REQUIRED: The path to the file within the Xcode project organization (e.g., 'ProjectName/Sources/MyFile.swift')

content.description: REQUIRED: The content to write to the file

name: XcodeUpdate
description: Edits files in the Xcode project by replacing text content. Works on Xcode project structure paths, not filesystem paths. IMPORTANT: The tool will fail if filePath, oldString, or newString parameters are missing.

filePath.description: REQUIRED: The path to the file to modify within the Xcode project organization (e.g., 'ProjectName/Sources/MyFile.swift')

newString.description: REQUIRED: The text to replace it with, must be different from oldString

replaceAll.description: Replace all occurrences of oldString (default false)

name: XcodeLS
description: Lists files and directories in the Xcode project structure at the specified path. Works on Xcode project organization, not filesystem structure.

recursive.description: Recursively list all files (truncated to 100 lines). Default: true

name: XcodeGlob
description: Finds files in the Xcode project structure matching wildcard patterns. Works on Xcode project organization, not filesystem structure. Example patterns: '*.swift', '**/*.json', 'src/**/*.{swift,m}'. If no pattern is provided, defaults to '**/*' (all files).

pattern.description: File matching pattern using wildcards (* ** ? [abc] {swift,m}). Examples: '*.swift', '**/*.json', 'src/**/*.{swift,m}'. Defaults to '**/*' if not provided.

path.description: Which project directory to search in (optional, defaults to root)

name: XcodeGrep
description: Searches for text patterns in files within the Xcode project structure using regex. Works on Xcode project organization, not filesystem structure. CRITICAL: Must include a 'pattern' argument - this tool will fail without it.

pattern.description: Text to search for using regex. REQUIRED.

path.description: Where to search - file or directory in project (defaults to root)

glob.description: Only search files matching this pattern

type.description: Shortcut for common file types (swift, js, py, etc.)

multiline.description: Allow patterns to span multiple lines

outputMode.description: What to return: content, filesWithMatches, or count (default: filesWithMatches)

showLineNumbers.description: Show line numbers with results (content mode only)

linesBefore.description: Show N lines before each match for context

linesAfter.description: Show N lines after each match for context

linesContext.description: Show N lines both before and after each match

name: XcodeMakeDir
description: Creates directories and groups in the Xcode project structure.

directoryPath.description: Project navigator relative path for the directory to create

name: XcodeMV
description: Moves or renames files and directories in the project navigator with support for filesystem operations.

sourcePath.description: Project navigator relative path of the source item to move/rename

destinationPath.description: Project navigator relative path for the destination (for move) or new name (for rename)

operation.description: The type of move operation to perform

overwriteExisting.description: Whether to overwrite existing files at the destination

name: XcodeRM
description: Removes files and directories from the Xcode project structure and optionally deletes the underlying files from the filesystem.

recursive.description: Remove directories and their contents recursively

deleteFiles.description: Also move the underlying files to Trash (defaults to true)

name: BuildProject
description: Builds an Xcode project and waits until the build completes.

name: GetBuildLog
description: Gets the log of the current or most recently finished build. You can choose which build log entries to include by specifying the severity of any issues emitted by the build task represented by the entry. You can also filter by message regex pattern or file glob pattern. The response also indicates whether the build is currently in progress.

severity.description: Limit the output of build log entries to those that emitted issues of the specified severity or higher. Valid values: 'error', 'warning', 'remark'. Defaults to 'error'.

pattern.description: Regex to filter the returned build log entries.

glob.description: Glob to filter the returned build log entries.

name: XcodeRefreshCodeIssuesInFile
description: Retrieves current compiler diagnostics (errors, warnings, notes) for a file in the Xcode project. Returns formatted diagnostic information including severity levels and messages.

filePath.description: The path to the file within the Xcode project organization (e.g., 'ProjectName/Sources/MyFile.swift')

name: XcodeListNavigatorIssues
description: Lists the currently known issues shown Xcode's Issue Navigator UI in the workspace. These issues include those that have been discovered since the last build, and also issues like package resolution problems and workspace configuration issues.

severity.description: Limit the returned issues to those that have the specified severity or higher. Valid values: 'error', 'warning', 'remark'. Defaults to 'error'.

pattern.description: Regex to filter the returned issues. Will match against the 'message' field.

glob.description: Glob to filter the returned issues. Will match against the 'path' field.

name: GetTestList
description: Gets all available tests from the active scheme's active test plan. Results are limited to 100 tests. The complete list is written to fullTestListPath in grep-friendly format.

name: RunAllTests
description: Runs all tests from the active scheme's active test plan

name: RunSomeTests
description: Runs specific tests using the active scheme's active test plan

tests.description: Array of test specifiers to run. Each specifier contains 'targetName' and 'testIdentifier' fields.

name: RenderPreview
description: Builds and renders a Preview and waits until a snapshot of the resulting UI is available.

sourceFilePath.description: The path to the file within the Xcode project organization (e.g., 'ProjectName/Sources/MyFile.swift')

previewDefinitionIndexInFile.description: The zero based index of the #Preview macro or PreviewProvider struct definition in the source file counting from the top. Defaults to 0.

timeout.description: The time in seconds to wait for the rendering of the preview to complete. Defaults to 120 seconds.

name: ExecuteSnippet
description: Builds and runs a snippet of code in the context of a specific file and waits until results are available. The output consists of the console output generated by the print statements contained in the provided snippet.

codeSnippet.description: The code snippet that should be executed in the context of the specified file.

sourceFilePath.description: The path to a Swift source file within the Xcode project organization whose context the code snippet will have access to (including fileprivate declarations).

timeout.description: The time in seconds to wait for the execution of the snippet to complete. Defaults to 120 seconds.

name: DocumentationSearch
description: Searches Apple Developer Documentation using semantic matching.

frameworks.description: Framework(s) to search in. Searches all frameworks if not specified.
